🏆 League Leaders

—
Every starter on today's slate + hot/cold teams. Window: L10 (last 10 played games).
🔗 How League Leaders feeds the PP-edge engine
Every factor below is already wired into v2_scorer.py:
  • Statcast Factor (SC): xBA, hard-hit%, K% over L14 days → contributes to combined_factor
  • L10 Factor: per-game per-stat rates over last 10 played games → contributes to combined_factor
  • Combined (ALL): SC × L10 (clamped 0.85–1.18) — the visible "heat" composite
  • PP-edge impact: when a player-prop pick fires on this player, SC + L10 are each softened by W=0.45, then compounded onto true_prob. The "PP" badge on each row shows the exact effective edge contribution.
  • Cold side: factors < 1.0 SUBTRACT from true_prob — engine dampens edges on slumping players automatically.
HOT — Top 15 — Overall
COLD — Bottom 15 — Overall

📐 Stake Recommender + Slip Tools

—
¼-Kelly stake per pick (today's open picks)
tier-capped · variance/sample dampened · hard cap 5% bankroll/pick
🤖 Auto-build parlay → Bet Builder slip
🎰 Pre-baked parlays (one-click load)
Top edges · LOCK stack · NRFI 2-leg · Lottery
🧠 Slip insights (live from Bet Builder)

🧮 Live Model State

factor stack + calibration params
📚 How the AI math works (reference)
  • · Stake Recommender: ¼-Kelly stake_pct = (b·p − q) / b · ¼ · tier_mult · 1/variance_adj · sample_dampener · capped at 5% bankroll
  • · Auto-build: scores picks by (edge_pp × 10 + tier_weight); takes top N for each risk profile
  • · Pre-baked Parlays: rule-based filters (LOCK only, NRFI top-2, longshots ≥ +150)
  • · AI Insights: parlay true_prob × correlation discount (1.15× per same-game leg pair), EV = stake × (true_prob × payout − loss_prob)
  • · Calibration pipeline: base_prob (American→prob) × ∏(softened factors with W) → true_prob (clamped 1–99%) → edge_pp = (true_prob − base_prob) × 100, clamped ±15pp
  • · AI Learner: reads settled picks + factor metadata weekly, aggregates lift per factor, recommends weight tweaks. Never auto-applies — operator reviews + hand-edits.

🎲 Strategies

Target markets · per-strategy attribution and ROI

🎯 Target strategies — markets the engine scores

—
Each FanDuel market is a separate strategy. Same 11-factor weight stack scores every pick; the strategy label is purely for attribution so we can tell which market is actually printing. Notion rows on the table below get created the first time a pick fires under that strategy.

Strategy Performance — —

MLB-only focus. Rows here appear as picks fire under each strategy. Old strategy names (e.g. "MLB Elite Hitter Hits") stay archived; new market-as-strategy rows auto-create. Active set: —.

    🔥 Most Confident Plays

    ⚾ NRFI / YRFI Watcher

    No-Run-First-Inning · team L20 + pitcher 1st-inning records
    NRFI = no run scored in 1st inning by either team. Extreme matchups (two top NRFI teams OR two top YRFI teams playing each other) auto-promote to LOCK + heat 100 on Most Confident Plays.

    A · Status & Timers

    🕓 Timers & Freshness

    Every clock, countdown, and "X ago" indicator the dashboard tracks — auto-updates from the same sources as the rest of the UI.

    📅 Data Freshness — 2 AM Rollover Health

    Every date-stamped data source the dashboard reads. After the 2 AM ET night-settle + 2:30 AM dashboard-refresh chain, all sources should advance to today's date by 9:30 AM ET.

    📡 Activity Feed

    last 36h
    Everything the system did, newest first. Pulls from logs/, settled archives, learner runs, API monitor. Read-only.

    C · Integrations
    PRIMARY https://daviddubray123-star.github.io/bettingos-dashboard/
    TUNNEL checking…
    ⚠ Both URLs are public-readable, no auth. Anyone with the link can see your full bankroll, picks, P/L. Treat as semi-public.

    🔑 Odds API Usage

    The Odds API — paid $30/mo Starter, 20k credits/month. Tracks every player-prop + team-market call. Target 70-90% utilization.

    📱 Telegram

    Bot ID: —
    Chat: SportsPicks channel
    Listener daemon: active (polls every ~25s)
    Commands from your phone:
    /status — bankrolls, last fire, pause state
    /picks — today's open picks
    /recap — push yesterday's recap
    /pause — emergency stop (next lock won't fire)
    /resume — clear pause
    /help — list all commands

    D · Engine

    🧠 AI Learner Manager

    Self-tuning observer reads your settled picks + engine scoring metadata, aggregates patterns, proposes engine tweaks. NEVER auto-applies. Full kill switch + thresholds + guardrails below.

    🧠 Engine Memory Index

    Every memory file the engine reads on session start, grouped by tier. Edit in memory/ or CLAUDE.md.

    🤖 Claude Code Usage

    Per-session token usage (input, output, cache). Today + all-time + 7-day sparkline. Refreshed by scripts/claude-usage-tracker.bat.

    💰 Bankroll & Caps

    🎨 Theme

    Saved automatically. Experimental: team palettes may have low contrast.

    📁 File paths
    Engine: BettingOS_Migration\
    Memory: memory\*.md
    Prompts: prompts\*.md
    Scripts: scripts\*.bat
    Lib: lib\notion_api.py · telegram.py · v2_*.py
    Logs: logs\*.complete · *.log

    ⚠ Disclaimer: Outputs are engine research, not financial advice. Sports betting involves risk of total loss. Past performance does not guarantee future results. All LIVE wagers are placed manually by the operator at their sole discretion. Consult local laws on legality; bet only what you can afford to lose. 18+ / 21+ where applicable.
